culot       2011-09-02 14:12:54 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-Log-Dispatch-DBI Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                              pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Log::Dispatch::DBI is a subclass of Log::Dispatch::Output, which
  inserts logging output into relational database using DBI interface.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Log-Dispatch-DBI/
  
  PR:             ports/160216
  Submitted by:   Ralf Gebhart <gebhart@secnetix.de>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
